form.formComment: Last start solid effort when 2nd (Fr1) over 1690m at Maryborough, at the bell was 3rd-7.2 beaten 5.5 m by Manda Kyvalley (2:04.50) in NR 42 to 47 on March 30 at $3.20. Two runs back posted a big 20 m win as favourite when quickly away, (Fr2) at Maryborough (2:43.00) beating Against The Bridle in NR up to 44 on March 16 at $1.80 at the bell was leading 4.5. Strong contender.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tired over the concluding stages to be beaten 59m into 8th place.

form.formComment: Resuming after four months off the scene. Finished off last campaign when well beaten into sixth behind Champagnes at Gunbower over 2030m in a NR up to 49 on December 14 at $17. Readied with two trials and draws for a good return.

formComments.title: TAB

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait when free of interference after the start.

form.formComment: First up. At the last run she 7th (Fr3) over 2190m at Maryborough, beaten 22 m by Mielicki (2:45.90) in NR 46 to 50 on January 4 at $31. Can play a role in the finish.

formComments.comment: First up. At the last run she 7th (Fr3) over 2190m at Maryborough, beaten 22 m by Mielicki (2:45.90) in NR 46 to 50 on January 4 at $31. Can play a role in the finish.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Broke gait shortly after the start and trailed the field thereafter.
Inconvenienced behind the tiring Kyvalley Anthony rounding the final turn.

form.formComment: Last start surrendered the lead and finished 8th (Fr4) over 1690m after showing early speed at Maryborough, beaten 21 m by Manda Kyvalley (2:04.50) in NR 42 to 47 on March 30 at $9.50. Two runs back 5th (Sr1) over 2100m at Charlton beaten 40 m by Off Your Faceski (2:36.90) in NR up to 49 on January 19 at $8.50. Solid prospect with that run under the belt.

form.formComment: Last start a big 6 m win after showing early speed, (Fr2) at Maryborough (2:50.40) beating Hear Me Major Tom in MAIDEN on March 30 at $8.50 at the bell was leading 4. This is tougher.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Gave ground over the concluding stages to be beaten 47m into 10th place.
Broke gait free of interference at the 600m.
Started to tire leaving the 300m mark to be beaten 51.2m.

form.formComment: Steps out over an extra 460m after a solid effort last start; 3rd (Fr5) over 1690m after showing early pace at Maryborough, at the bell was 2nd-0.4 beaten 5.5 m by Manda Kyvalley (2:04.50) in NR 42 to 47 on March 30 at $2.60.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr1) over 2190m at Maryborough, at the bell was 2nd-4.6 beaten 12 m by Piesridingshotgun (2:45.40) in NR 48 to 52 on March 30 at $15. Before that, 5th (Sr1) over 1690m at Shepparton, at the bell was 8th-16.2 beaten 7 m by Settle The Bill (2:06.20) in NR up to 49 on March 17 at $41. Capable of a strong showing.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Utilised sprint lane in home straight.
Paced during the score up and galloped as the start was effected.

form.formComment: Last start was driven from back in the field when 6th (Fr6) over 1690m after racing wide at Maryborough, at the bell was 8th-21.5 beaten 14 m by Manda Kyvalley (2:04.50) in NR 42 to 47 on March 30 at $21. At the start before took no part at Shepparton (NR up to 50) on March 24 over 1690m. May be ready to show more.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Hung out and broke gait free of interference approaching the 700m mark.
Broke in the run to the finish.
Hung out at various stages of the event.

form.formComment: Last start 3rd (Sr2) over 1650m at this track, beaten 22 m by Calabasas (2:04.10) in MAIDEN M on March 25 at $51. Two runs back was well beaten after breaking at Kilmore on January 15. Prefer others.
